mask.description: Mask pattern. Use '9' for digit, 'a' for letter, '*' for alphanumeric, any other char as literal separator. Either mask or preset must be provided

preset.description: Built-in mask preset that auto-fills the mask and a SR-readable format hint

formatHint.description: Format hint string surfaced under the input and linked via aria-describedby. Auto-derived from preset when not provided

value.description: Current value (raw or masked — component normalises it)

onRawChange.description: Called with the raw (unmasked) value alongside the masked display value

slotChar.description: Character shown for empty mask slots

includeLiterals.description: Whether to include literal separator characters in the onChange value

error.description: Error message string (also marks invalid). Pass `true` to mark invalid without a visible message

invalid.description: Force the field into an invalid state without an error message

helperText.description: Helper text rendered under the input and linked via aria-describedby

placeholder.description: Placeholder text. Defaults to the mask itself

id.description: Unique id for the input element
